subcodes.first_line: O thou who art attracted by the divine fragrances! Give thanks unto God that from the Sinai of mystic knowledge the call of the All-Merciful hath been raised from the Tree of Man [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منجذب بنفحات الله شکر کن خدا را که در سیناء عرفان ندای رحمان از شجره انسان
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @being a source of light; guidance, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @call to action
